The Ascended Bands of Orcus are the remnants of the Great Chironite Empire before it was destroyed in the Armageddon of 2015 CE. Averaging around ~41 Ci/km2 on the planetís atmosphere, nearly all biodiversity has been extinguished by the miasma of radiation and biological weapons. However, the Centaur population had somehow managed to survive, and despite irreversibly losing everything they have ever had, life goes on for them. Ruled by the God-Prophets, or a group of Centaurs who have the faculties left to wield their long-lost technology of their former empire, they have finally managed to return to the stars to wage revenge on reality.

The Golden Hordes of Liber are a race of Warrior-Shamans. Organized into Clan governance, they are united by their Champions, whom have absolute authority over their realms. Unlike the human clans of our past, Centaurs have a natural predisposition to personal combat, preventing world wars with mere duels. The Golden Hordes therefore settle their disputes through combat trials and summary executions; leaders who are successful are allowed to live, and those who fail are challenged to the death. A Liberian's pride is only earned by the measure of flesh he has taken from others.
The planet of Apollo. Gripped in the palm of The Champion.

The Jockey enemy is a rare enemy, only appearing on the final level of the game. Not only will the the Jockey hurl full speed-at you with clenched lethal fists- it has a shooter enemy riding on top of it. On top of having to flee this monsters's angry fists, you will need to dodge it's friend's rapid bullets. Oh dear.

The Pongo Bird is a moderatelty common enemy. It tends to hover around trees, attacking you head-on or from behind by surprise. This evil creature may look cute, but it will annoyingly fly around your head - rapidly blasting laser-balls at you. It's strategic flying movements will require fast-paced pongo-aiming skills. Watch out!
Mr. Pew is not your freind- I can promise you that.
What time is it? It is time to save the island of Flubber! Grab your pongo stick and get monster slayin'.
After playing Pongo for a while, you will slowly learn the neuances in your pogo's controls and all of the subtle bouncing tricks- making you a true Pongo athlete. Are you Pongo MLG?
Space queen! Hot as fire, tough as leather.
Watch out for the Mukka spaceships! They are fiercely hungry.
Yargis' best friend! Skilled pilot.
The Civilian Captain does not always listen very well. Watch out  :)

Young, smart, and cute as a button.
Commander Beemis is wise and firm. Also likes to pound some bad guys from time to time.
